items.name_en: The Oversized Panda🐼 Chanel Classic Flap is stunning. The eye-catching LOGO on the body makes it instantly recognizable as Chanel. ✅ Shoulder ✅ Handheld. It holds everything. The Classic Flap is versatile, understated, timeless, lightweight, and spacious. Perfect for daily commuting. I've tested it for you! A casual Classic Flap tote is practical as a mom bag or for school. Double C LOGO is classic and durable. Very spacious with an effortless, lazy vibe! 🧺 Handbag, pink lining is sweet yet cool. Top-tier value in Chanel vintage. Super spacious and lightweight~
items.name_cn:

Model: AS6337
Size: 30-25-15

items.name_en: The term 'BAGUETTE' commonly refers to a 'baguette bread', but in the fashion world, it is the name of a classic FENDI handbag, known as the 'Fendi Baguette'. 'FENDI' is a renowned Italian fashion brand famous for high-end leather goods, clothing, and accessories. 'ROMA' means 'Rome' in Italian; here it likely refers to the brand's association with the city of Rome, such as its origins. Rome is a key city in Italy's fashion industry, with many brands having deep historical and cultural roots there. Model number 1979.

items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne Avenue bag features an elegant design, elevating the style of this classic series. Crafted from blue Oblique print fabric, the rounded flap has a refined curve and is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain featuring alternating gold-finish metal links and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. The pleated design offers ample space and a refined silhouette, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody carry.
items.name_cn:
This 30 Montaigne Avenue bag features an elegant design, elevating the style of this classic series. Crafted from blue Oblique print fabric, the rounded flap has a refined curve and is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain featuring alternating gold-finish metal links and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. The pleated design offers ample space and a refined silhouette, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody carry.
Dimensions: 22.5 x 12.5 x 6.5
0322

items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne Avenue handbag features an elegant design that elevates the style of this classic series. Crafted from black patent calfskin, the rounded flap features a refined curve and is accented with a vintage gold-finish metal CD turnlock, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo and features the classic chain strap alternating between gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. Pleated design, spacious interior, refined silhouette, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne chain bag
items.name_cn:
This 30 Montaigne chain bag
A classic and elegant chain bag that enriches the 30 Montaigne collection. Crafted with blue jacquard fabric, highlighting the classic Oblique print. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details, such as the embossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlight the clean design. Small size, with a chain strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Flap closure
CD clasp
Back embossed 30 Montaigne logo
Removable, adjustable leather chain strap
Internal patch pocket
Back pocket
Includes dust bag
Model: M9334
Dimensions: 21*12*6cm

items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne handbag is crafted from blue Oblique jacquard fabric, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is exquisitely decorated with a '30 Montaigne' embossed logo, and the military-style buckle design is sharp and refined. The small size comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

items.name_en: This D-Vibe East-West micro bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer collection. Its simple and modern silhouette enriches the D-Vibe series. Crafted with materials like blue Oblique print fabric and accented with matching leather details. The slip pocket easily holds daily essentials. It features a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
items.name_cn:
This D-Vibe East-West micro bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer collection. Its simple and modern silhouette enriches the D-Vibe series. Crafted with materials like blue Oblique print fabric and accented with matching leather details. The slip pocket easily holds daily essentials. It features a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, dust bag included

items.name_en: This Dior Jolie Top Handle mini chain bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Pre-Fall collection, presenting an elegant and practical design. Crafted in Black calfskin, it features a trellis pattern, with a flap adorned with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beading. It features an interior pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain shoulder strap, which consists of leather straps and CD chain links adorned with white resin beads. It can be carried comfortably by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and pairs well with both casual and evening looks.
items.name_cn:
This Dior Jolie Top Handle mini chain bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Pre-Fall collection, presenting an elegant and practical design. Crafted in Black calfskin, it features a trellis pattern, with a flap adorned with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beading. It features an interior pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain shoulder strap, which consists of leather straps and CD chain links adorned with white resin beads. It can be carried comfortably by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and pairs well with both casual and evening looks.
Main: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Magnetic flap closure with CD buckle and white resin beading on the front
1 compartment
Double top leather handles
Adjustable, detachable chain with resin beading and leather straps
Made in Italy Dimensions: 18.5 x 13 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
Style No.: S3123

specs.rawTitle:
This Dior Jolie Top Handle mini chain bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Pre-Fall collection, presenting an elegant and practical design. Crafted in Blush Pink calfskin, it features a trellis pattern, with a flap adorned with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beading. It features an interior pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain shoulder strap, which consists of leather straps and CD chain links adorned with white resin beads. It can be carried comfortably by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and pairs well with both casual and evening looks.
Main: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Magnetic flap closure with CD buckle and white resin beading on the front
1 compartment
Double top leather handles
Adjustable, detachable chain with resin beading and leather straps
Made in Italy Dimensions: 18.5 x 13 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
